messages.author: dandri
messages.text: Hi i will be putting up a repeater on the mountain Úlfarsfell in the next days. I took down the meshtastic node home with me to flash newer bootloader and flash MC. Look forward to seeing more people! EU/UK Narrow (edited)
messages.content_html: Hi i will be putting up a repeater on the mountain Úlfarsfell in the next days. I took down the meshtastic node home with me to flash newer bootloader and flash MC. Look forward to seeing more people! EU/UK Narrow (edited)

messages.author: Kveldulfur
messages.text: Nice! Recently moved a node to MeshCore. Slightly confused. I was on EU long, but I noticed the ex-Meshtastic repeater on Úlfarsfell was mentioning EU Narrow.. I did see 2 nodes on long, but just switched to narrow to see who is there. (edited)

New Optimised Performance Helium Network Antennas from McGill Microwave Systems Ltd. This new Antenna design has been specifically tuned to operate with peak performance over only the frequency band of interest to UK/EU Helium Hotspot operators – the UK/EU 868 frequency band.
